---
format: html
title: validate_trait_corrections()
---

<html><head>
<meta http-equiv="Content-Type" content="text/html; charset=utf-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, user-scalable=yes" />
<link rel="stylesheet" href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.css">
<script type="text/javascript">
const macros = { "\\R": "\\textsf{R}", "\\mbox": "\\text", "\\code": "\\texttt"};
function processMathHTML() {
    var l = document.getElementsByClassName('reqn');
    for (let e of l) { katex.render(e.textContent, e, { throwOnError: false, macros }); }
    return;
}</script>
<script defer src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/katex@0.15.3/dist/katex.min.js"
    onload="processMathHTML();"></script>
<link rel="stylesheet" type="text/css" href="R.css" />
</head><body><div class="container"><main>

<table style="width: 100%;"><tr><td>validate_trait_corrections</td><td style="text-align: right;">R Documentation</td></tr></table>

<h2>Validate Trait Manual Corrections File</h2>

<h3>Description</h3>

<p>Reads the trait manual corrections CSV file and checks that every
row has been reviewed by a human. Acts as a pipeline guard: if any
row has a 'CHECKED' value that is not 'TRUE' (i.e. is 'NA',
'FALSE', or absent), the function calls 'cli::cli_abort()' listing
the number of unchecked rows so the pipeline stops until a human
has signed off the file.
</p>


<h3>Usage</h3>

<pre><code class='language-R'>validate_trait_corrections(path_corrections)
</code></pre>


<h3>Arguments</h3>

<table role = "presentation">
<tr><td><code id="path_corrections">path_corrections</code></td>
<td>
<p>A character scalar giving the file path to
'trait_manual_corrections.csv'.</p>
</td></tr>
</table>


<h3>Details</h3>

<p>The expected CSV columns are: 'taxon_name', 'trait_domain_name',
'action', 'scale_factor', 'notes', 'CHECKED'. The abort message
reports exactly how many rows have not been validated and instructs
the user to set 'CHECKED = TRUE' after reviewing.
</p>


<h3>Value</h3>

<p>A tibble of validated corrections (all rows have 'CHECKED == TRUE')
when every row is approved. Aborts via 'cli::cli_abort()' if any
row is not yet validated.
</p>


<h3>See Also</h3>

<p>[generate_trait_qc_report()], [apply_trait_corrections()]
</p>

</main>

</div>
</body></html>
